hero.headline: Garage door problems? We fix them fast.
hero.sub: Broken springs, jammed doors, full replacements — most repairs done same day across Central Florida.

steps.title: Call or Book Online
steps.text: Tell us what's happening. We'll get you scheduled — often same day.

steps.title: We Come to You
steps.text: A tech arrives on time, diagnoses the problem, and gives you a written quote before touching anything.

steps.title: Fix It Right
steps.text: We carry the most common parts on every truck. Most repairs are done in a single visit.

steps.title: Leave It Better
steps.text: We balance, lubricate, and safety-test the full door before we leave — not just the broken part.

cta.heading: Ready to get started?
cta.text: Get your free, no-obligation estimate today — we respond within one business day.

teaser.heading: Garage door service, done right the first time
teaser.intro: Repairs, new installs, and tune-ups for homeowners across Central Florida — most jobs done same day.

page.heading: Everything we do for your garage door
page.intro: From a snapped spring at 6am to a full new-door install, here is the complete range of work we handle — and exactly what you can expect from each.

items.name: Garage Door Repair
items.blurb: Fast fixes for broken springs, cables, rollers, and openers.
items.description: A broken spring or snapped cable can leave your door stuck and your car trapped. We carry the common parts on every truck, so most repairs are finished in a single visit — safely tensioned, balance-tested, and backed by our workmanship warranty.

features.title: Springs & cables
features.text: Broken spring or snapped cable? We carry the most common sizes on every truck.

features.title: Same-day service
features.text: Most repair calls are scheduled and completed the same day you call.

features.title: Parts on the truck
features.text: No waiting on orders — we stock the parts that break most often.

features.title: 2-yr warranty
features.text: Every repair is backed by our 2-year workmanship guarantee.

items.name: New Door Installation
items.blurb: Modern, insulated doors that boost curb appeal and efficiency.
items.description: Ready for an upgrade? We help you choose the right style, insulation, and finish for your home, then handle the full removal and installation. New doors come with manufacturer warranties and a smoother, quieter operation you will notice every day.

features.title: Free style consult
features.text: We help you pick the right door for your home, budget, and curb appeal.

features.title: Full removal & install
features.text: We handle everything — old door haul-away is always included.

features.title: Quiet & insulated
features.text: Modern insulated doors run quieter and keep your garage more comfortable.

features.title: Manufacturer warranty
features.text: New doors come with the full manufacturer warranty plus our workmanship guarantee.

items.name: Tune-Ups & Maintenance
items.blurb: Annual service that prevents the breakdowns before they happen.
items.description: Most garage door failures are preventable. Our multi-point tune-up lubricates moving parts, re-balances the door, tightens hardware, and catches worn components before they fail — extending the life of your system and keeping it quiet.

features.title: 23-point inspection
features.text: We check every component — springs, cables, rollers, tracks, opener, sensors.

features.title: Full lubrication
features.text: Proper lubrication is the single biggest thing you can do to extend door life.

features.title: Hardware tightening
features.text: Loose bolts and hinges cause noise and premature wear — we tighten everything.

features.title: Annual plan available
features.text: Ask about our annual tune-up plan — one call and we schedule the rest.

items.name: Smart Opener Installation
items.blurb: Wi-Fi openers you can check, open, and share from your phone.
items.description: Swap a noisy old chain-drive opener for a quiet belt-drive smart opener you can control from anywhere. We handle the full install, pair it to your phone, and walk you through sharing access with family or guests before we leave.

features.title: Control from anywhere
features.text: Open, close, and check your door's status from your phone, wherever you are.

features.title: Whisper-quiet belt drive
features.text: No more middle-of-the-night garage rattling — belt drives run near-silent.

features.title: Battery backup option
features.text: Keep working through a power outage with an optional battery backup unit.

features.title: Easy guest access
features.text: Share temporary or permanent access with family, guests, or dog walkers.

items.name: Emergency Same-Day Service
items.blurb: Door stuck open or shut? We get someone out fast, day or night.
items.description: A garage door that won't open or close is a security risk and a hassle. Our emergency line is answered around the clock, and most calls get a tech on-site the same day — often within a couple of hours.

features.title: 24/7 answered line
features.text: A real person answers any time, day or night — no automated runaround.

features.title: Fast response
features.text: Most emergency calls get a tech on-site within a couple of hours.

features.title: Fully stocked trucks
features.text: Our emergency trucks carry the parts needed to fix most issues in one visit.

features.title: Secure it same-day
features.text: We won't leave your home or shop insecure — the door gets fixed or safely secured.

items.name: Commercial Garage Doors
items.blurb: Repair and installs for warehouses, shops, and fleet bays.
items.description: From single-bay shop doors to high-cycle warehouse rollups, we service the commercial equipment homeowners' trucks don't carry parts for. Ask about maintenance plans and priority response for business accounts.

features.title: Built for commercial doors
features.text: High-cycle springs and industrial track systems, not just residential parts.

features.title: Maintenance plans
features.text: Scheduled service plans keep multi-door properties running without surprises.

features.title: Priority response
features.text: Business accounts get priority scheduling — downtime costs you money.

features.title: Invoicing & accounts
features.text: Net-30 invoicing available for established business accounts.

teaser.heading: Serving Greater Orlando
teaser.intro: If you're in the area, we come to you. A few of the communities we serve:

page.heading: Garage door service across Central Florida
page.intro: We cover a wide stretch of Orange, Seminole, Osceola, and Lake counties — and we come to you.

teaser.heading: 20 years fixing garage doors. We know what matters.
teaser.text: We started Summit Garage Door because we kept seeing homeowners get burned by slow response times and inflated quotes. Every truck is stocked, every tech is licensed, and every estimate is written before a single bolt is touched.
checklist: Written quote before any work starts
Same tech from first call to final check
Parts on the truck — no waiting on orders

page.heading: Built on showing up and doing it right
page.intro: Family-run, licensed, and committed to treating every home like our own — here's a bit about how we got started.

story: Summit Garage Door was founded in 2004 by two techs who got tired of watching homeowners wait a week for a spring replacement. We started with one truck and a promise: same-day service, honest quotes, and no upsell games.

Twenty years later we're still a family operation — just with more trucks. Every tech on our crew has been with us for at least three years. That matters because it means the person who shows up knows what they're doing, doesn't cut corners, and treats your home like a job site worth caring about.

values.title: On time or we call
values.text: If we're going to be late, we tell you — and we mean it.

values.title: Written before we touch it
values.text: You approve the quote before we pick up a single tool.

values.title: One visit, done
values.text: We stock parts on every truck so most jobs don't require a return trip.

page.heading: Get a free estimate
page.intro: Fill out the form and we'll get back to you within one business day — usually much faster.

items.quote: Spring snapped at 7am on a Monday. They had someone here by noon, fixed it in 45 minutes, and the price matched the quote exactly. Couldn't ask for more.
items.name: David R.

items.quote: Got three quotes. Summit was mid-range on price but the only one who explained exactly what was wrong and why. Easy choice. Door's been perfect ever since.
items.name: Maria T.

items.quote: Annual tune-up — they found two rollers about to go and swapped them on the spot. Saved me from the exact same emergency call I had two years ago.
items.name: James K.

items.q: How fast can you get here?
items.a: Most calls are scheduled same day. We keep slots open for urgent repairs, so call early and we'll do our best to be there today.
Yes — every estimate is free and comes in writing, with no obligation and no pressure.
Fully licensed and insured in Florida. We're happy to provide documentation before any work begins.

items.q: What if the repair costs more than quoted?
items.a: We call you first — always. Nothing beyond the quoted scope gets done without your approval.
